title: BedWars
description: BedWars is a plugin for you to play BedWars using MiniGameCore and it's API!
body:
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-1.0_SNAPSHOT-blue)
# BedWars

**BedWars** is a Minecraft minigame plugin built on top of **MiniGameCore** and it's API!

Defend your bed by gathering resources like iron, gold, emeralds or diamonds! Upgrade your gear, and eliminate enemy teams and their beds on your very own Minecraft Server.

This Plugin features:
- Custom shops with different levels of armor, tools and weapons
- Team Upgrades like Sharpness, Protection and Base-Generator-Upgrades
- Special items including Fireballs, Iron-Golem Spawn-Eggs and Auto-Igniting TNT
- Team and Island Generators that level up during the game
- Stats and Scoreboards to track wins, ties and losses during and after the game

![BedWars Lobby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c518b1caaf294a7c746508bb83594478a12945aa_0.webp)

## 🔧 Installation

1. Download the latest BedWars `.jar` from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/mgcbedwars) or Releases.
2. Download the latest MiniGameCore `.jar` from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/minigamecore).
2. Place both files in the `plugins/` folder of your Minecraft server.
3. For permission-management, you can optionally use a plugin like [LuckPerms](https://luckperms.net/).
4. Restart the server once.
